growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined minimal medium (NO3- reduction medium)

up.method: ion chromatography time-course; SynCom NO3- reduction rate increased relative to both monocultures
ion chromatography time-course; electron donor (can become limiting at high NO3-)

sec.units: mM (inferred final product; not reported as a rate)
sec.method: inferred from mass balance: transient NO2- fully reduced with no residual N2O or ammonia accumulation -> complete reduction to N2
ion chromatography; transient accumulation then full consumption

sec.units: mM (off-gassed only under high NO3- / high 3H11 fraction)
sec.method: GC headspace + Henry's law; N2O emission driven by NO2- toxicity; inflection at ~7.5 mM NO2-

yields.note: SynCom growth rate and NO3- reduction rate both exceed monocultures due to intermediate (NO2-/NO) exchange reducing inter-enzyme competition and relieving NO2- toxicity

growth_records.cite: Carr, Alex V et al. Emergence and disruption of cooperativity in a denitrifying microbial community. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf093. [PMC12146267]
growth_records.method: reported (measured by OD600; SynCom maximum growth rate was significantly greater than either monoculture [Fig 1F, Welch t-test]; numeric per-hour value not in text)
growth_records.snippet: The SynCom growth rate was significantly greater than the growth rate of both isolates in monoculture. Additionally, the rate of NO3- reduction was increased relative to the individual monocultures, followed by a transient accumulation of N
growth_records.notes: R12+3H11 two-member SynCom, anaerobic batch, 20 mM acetate + 10 mM NaNO3, 30C, pH 7.2. Complete denitrification (NO3- -> N2) achieved via exchange of NO2- and NO between members. Experimentally, SynCom showed higher max growth rate and faster NO3- reduction than either monoculture (measured by OD600 and ion chromatography). Model (GEM + Monod kinetic) uptake/production rates for acetate, NO3-, NO2- were derived from these time-courses but numeric values reside in the GitHub repo / figures, not the article text -> rate=null. N2O off-gassing occurred only at high NO3- (proportional to initial NO3-, above ~20 mM) and high 3H11 inoculum fraction, driven by NO2- toxicity (inflection ~7.5 mM NO2-). Steady-state community composition ~65% 3H11 / 35% R12 by unique-peptide proteomics.
